# pdnd_tenants (Data Source)

Lists PDND tenants with optional IPA code and tax code filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_tenants" "all" {}

data "pdnd_tenants" "by_ipa" {
  ipa_code = "c_h501"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ipa_code` (String) Filter by IPA code
- `tax_code` (String) Filter by tax code

### Read-Only

- `tenants` (Attributes List) List of tenants (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenants))

<a id="nestedatt--tenants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenants`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `kind` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `onboarded_at` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
